recommendations.title: Ana e Vitória
recommendations.overview: Two girls have a chance encounter and instantly befriend. While trying to find themselves, they decide to pursue music together.

recommendations.title: The Virgin Suicides
recommendations.overview: A group of male friends become obsessed with five mysterious sisters who are sheltered by their strict, religious parents.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Dead Poets Society
recommendations.overview: At an elite, old-fashioned boarding school in New England, a passionate English teacher inspires his students to rebel against convention and seize the potential of every day, courting the disdain of the stern headmaster.

recommendations.title: The Thing Called Love
recommendations.overview: A group of newcomers to the country music business seek love and stardom.

recommendations.title: The History Boys
recommendations.overview: The story of an unruly class of bright, funny history students at a Yorkshire grammar school in pursuit of an undergraduate place at Oxford or Cambridge. Bounced between their maverick English master, a young and shrewd teacher hired to up their test

recommendations.title: The Miracle
recommendations.overview: 1960s Turkey countryside. A newly assigned teacher finds out that the solitary village is missing a school. He gets fond of the village people and especially a disabled man. The teacher helps the village to build a new school and educate the children

recommendations.title: Rock 'n' Roll High School
recommendations.overview: A group of rock-music-loving students, with the help of the Ramones, take over their school to combat its newly installed oppressive administration.

recommendations.title: Chhichhore
recommendations.overview: Following a group of friends from university as they progress into middle-age life and go their own separate ways.
